VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-images.name: Chat Images
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-images.hint: Allow image, video, and audio posting in chat.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-images.description: Adds a chat-controls button, drag-and-drop uploads, paste uploads, and cimage/cvideo/caudio commands.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-images.UnsupportedFi: Only image, video, and audio files can be posted to chat.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-images.NoUploadPermi: You need the Upload New Files permission to upload media.
